common.exampleQuestion: How do I configure the channels to index?

login.description: Your Discord community's knowledge, indexed and searchable. Sign in to search and chat with the agent.

chat.historyError: Couldn't load the history. Try again.
chat.historyEmpty: You don't have any saved conversations yet.
chat.emptyStateDescription: The agent answers with RAG over the community's knowledge and cites its sources.
chat.genericError: Couldn't complete the response. Try again.
chat.historyLoadError: Couldn't load the conversation. Try again.

docs.title: Indexed documents
docs.description: Each resource is a link shared in the community, enriched with an AI-generated title and description. The amber dot marks unread resources — tap a row to mark it as read.
docs.loadError: Couldn't load the documents. Try again.
docs.emptyStateTitle: You're all caught up! No unread resources left.
docs.emptyStateDescription: Remove the "Unread" filter to see all indexed knowledge.

search.title: Knowledge search
search.description: Semantic search over indexed Discord messages. Each result cites its original source.
search.error: Couldn't complete the search. Try again.
search.emptyStateTitle: No matches in the indexed knowledge.
search.emptyStateDescription: Try other terms or ask the agent in the chat.

stats.title: Stats
stats.description: The community's knowledge pulse: what gets indexed, who participates and how much the agent gets consulted.
stats.error: Couldn't load the stats. Try again.
stats.channelsEmpty: No data in your channels yet.

errors.AUTH_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.GUILD_MEMBER_REQUIRED: You need to be a member of the Discord server to access this.
errors.INVALID_OAUTH_STATE: The login session is invalid. Try again.
errors.OAUTH_CALLBACK_FAILED: Couldn't complete the sign-in with Discord.
errors.RBAC_EXPANSION_FAILED: Couldn't resolve your permissions. Try again.
errors.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to access this resource.
errors.INTERNAL: An internal error occurred. Try again.
